Originally priced at $1,400, this ultrawide display has more recently been hovering around the $1,100 mark at Amazon, making this offer a particularly notable one. Today’s deal knocks a massive $442 off its usual going rate, delivering a solid 40% discount and marking the lowest price we’ve tracked for this model so far. While it may not be the cheapest ultrawide gaming monitor on the market, it’s still an excellent value for a curved OLED panel with a 240Hz refresh rate. We recently saw the larger 39-inch version of this monitor hit a new all-time low as well, and now the more compact 34-inch variant is now at a great price for folks looking for a slightly smaller setup. Head below for more details.
